hypothesis_result: REJECTED — Transfer-Encoding: chunked alone does NOT fix SSE parsing
remaining_differences: Connection: close vs keep-alive — browser may not keep SSE stream open with Connection: close
Missing CORS credentials — Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true not present
Missing Content-Encoding — real uses br (Brotli) but this should not matter
CORS origin mismatch — * vs specific origin, may affect credentialed requests
Chunked encoding FORMAT may be wrong — hex-size framing might not match what browser expects

recommendations.priority_2: Verify chunked encoding format is correct (hex-size CRLF data CRLF pattern)
